queries.name: node_count_after_copy
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN count(p) AS n

queries.name: node_id_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.id ORDER BY p.id

queries.name: node_name_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.id

queries.name: node_age_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.age ORDER BY p.id

queries.name: node_full_row_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.id = 1 RETURN p.id, p.name, p.age

queries.name: node_filter_after_copy
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age > 28 RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.name

queries.name: rel_copy_and_count
queries.cypher: COPY Knows FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/knows.csv'; MATCH ()-[k:Knows]->() RETURN count(k) AS n

queries.name: rel_traversal_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person)-[k:Knows]->(b:Person) RETURN a.id, b.id ORDER BY a.id, b.id

queries.name: rel_property_readback
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person)-[k:Knows]->(b:Person) RETURN a.id, b.id, k.since ORDER BY a.id, b.id

queries.name: rel_filter_by_property
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person)-[k:Knows]->(b:Person) WHERE k.since >= 2021 RETURN a.id, b.id ORDER BY a.id, b.id

queries.name: rel_degree_via_copy
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:Knows]->(other:Person) RETURN p.id, count(other) AS out_degree ORDER BY p.id

queries.name: copy_to_nodes_creates_no_result_rows
queries.cypher: COPY (MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.id, p.name, p.age ORDER BY p.id) TO '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_persons.csv'

queries.name: copy_to_filtered_creates_no_result_rows
queries.cypher: COPY (MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age > 28 RETURN p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.id) TO '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_persons_filtered.csv'

queries.name: copy_to_rel_export_creates_no_result_rows
queries.cypher: COPY (MATCH (a:Person)-[k:Knows]->(b:Person) RETURN a.id, b.id, k.since ORDER BY a.id, b.id) TO '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_knows.csv'

queries.name: copy_to_aggregation_export
queries.cypher: COPY (MATCH (p:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:Knows]->(other:Person) RETURN p.id, count(other) AS out_degree ORDER BY p.id) TO '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_degrees.csv'

queries.name: readback_after_copy_to_unchanged
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN count(p) AS n

queries.name: load_from_declared_input_row_count
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id INT64, name STRING, age INT64) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' RETURN count(*) AS n

queries.name: load_from_declared_input_ordered_ids
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id INT64, name STRING, age INT64) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' RETURN id ORDER BY id

queries.name: load_from_declared_input_names
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id INT64, name STRING, age INT64) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' RETURN name ORDER BY id

queries.name: load_from_with_where_filter
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id INT64, name STRING, age INT64) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' WHERE age > 28 RETURN id, name ORDER BY id

queries.name: load_from_round_trip_row_count
queries.cypher: LOAD FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_persons.csv' RETURN count(*) AS n

queries.name: load_from_filtered_round_trip_row_count
queries.cypher: LOAD FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_persons_filtered.csv' RETURN count(*) AS n

queries.name: copy_to_complex_projection
queries.cypher: COPY (MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name AS name, p.age * 2 AS double_age, substring(p.name, 1, 3) AS tag ORDER BY p.id) TO '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_complex.csv'

queries.name: load_from_complex_projection
queries.cypher: LOAD FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/out_complex.csv' RETURN count(*) AS n

queries.name: load_from_skip_limit
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id INT64, name STRING, age INT64) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' RETURN id, name ORDER BY id SKIP 1 LIMIT 2

queries.name: load_from_inline_structural_cast
queries.cypher: LOAD WITH HEADERS (id STRING, name STRING, age STRING) FROM '/var/folders/75/k03x0_795d79qmcw1r5l0w440000gn/T/bogdb_golden_1f19857dfddb449087c5a881ae706ab8/persons.csv' WHERE cast(id, 'INT64') > 2 RETURN cast(age, 'INT64') * 2 AS doubleAge ORDER BY id
